  "active_set": ["R1.1", "R1.3", "R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The gap statement and contribution claim are present but buried in verbose hedging ('which is something we believe represents…'); improvement naturally includes surfacing these more crisply.",
    "R1.3": "The artifact makes precise numerical claims (22–42 pp collapse, 85 %→50 % deployment drop, >99.6 % model-based). These must not be silently altered or softened during polish; preserving alignment with implied experimental evidence is a live responsibility.",
    "R1.5": "The macro arc (gap → method → results → conclusion) is sound but three paragraphs blur method description, result reporting, and interpretation; restructuring at the paragraph level is a plausible and expected part of 'improve'.",
    "R1.6": "Load-bearing. 'Improve this draft' most directly targets prose quality. The artifact is saturated with run-on sentences, stacked relative clauses, redundant hedges ('which we consider to be relatively poor', 'going forward', 'that we have evaluated in this study'), and parenthetical over-explanation that must be resolved."
  },
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": ""
}

rationale.R1.1: The gap statement and contribution claim are present but buried in verbose hedging ('which is something we believe represents…'); improvement naturally includes surfacing these more crisply.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes precise numerical claims (22–42 pp collapse, 85 %→50 % deployment drop, >99.6 % model-based). These must not be silently altered or softened during polish; preserving alignment with implied experimental evidence is a live responsibility.
rationale.R1.5: The macro arc (gap → method → results → conclusion) is sound but three paragraphs blur method description, result reporting, and interpretation; restructuring at the paragraph level is a plausible and expected part of 'improve'.
rationale.R1.6: Load-bearing. 'Improve this draft' most directly targets prose quality. The artifact is saturated with run-on sentences, stacked relative clauses, redundant hedges ('which we consider to be relatively poor', 'going forward', 'that we have evaluated in this study'), and parenthetical over-explanation that must be resolved.
